dashboard.label: Search And Drilldown
dashboard.description: Guided audit, gateway-log, diagnostics, metrics, and traces searches for local investigation.

html.p: Use the public query interface and these SPL pivots together. The current phase supports audit investigation, structured gateway-log troubleshooting, diagnostics-driven queue and session analytics, plus event-indexed metrics-and-traces pivots for usage, cost, duration, and span activity.

search.query: `defenseclaw_audit_base` | table timestamp run_id session_id action severity actor target details component status | sort - timestamp | head 15
`openclaw_gateway_logs_base` | table timestamp level subsystem run_id session_id status error_code request_id message | sort - timestamp | head 15
`openclaw_diagnostics_base` | table timestamp event_name lane session_id session_key run_id outcome reason wait_ms queue_depth duration_ms attempt | sort - timestamp | head 15
`openclaw_metrics_base` | table timestamp metric_name metric_value unit provider model run_id session_id session_key | sort - timestamp | head 15
`openclaw_traces_base` | table timestamp span_name trace_id span_id run_id session_id session_key duration_ms provider model status | sort - timestamp | head 15

| makeresults count=12 | streamstats count as row | eval pivot=case(row=1, "Recent run and session inventory", row=2, "Recent gateway errors", row=3, "Recent diagnostics events", row=4, "Queue lane activity", row=5, "Stuck sessions", row=6, "Run attempts and retries", row=7, "Message processing failures", row=8, "Session state transitions", row=9, "Run and session correlated gateway logs", row=10, "Missing diagnostics telemetry", row=11, "Recent model usage and cost", row=12, "Recent trace spans"), spl=case(row=1, "`defenseclaw_run_inventory` | table run_id session_id count actions severities", row=2, "`openclaw_gateway_errors` | table timestamp level subsystem error_code request_id message | sort - timestamp", row=3, "`openclaw_diagnostics_recent` | head 20", row=4, "`openclaw_queue_lane_events` | stats count avg(wait_ms) as avg_wait_ms max(wait_ms) as max_wait_ms by lane outcome", row=5, "`openclaw_stuck_sessions` | table timestamp session_id session_key run_id lane outcome reason wait_ms | sort - timestamp", row=6, "`openclaw_run_attempt_events` | table timestamp run_id session_id session_key attempt outcome reason duration_ms | sort - timestamp", row=7, "`openclaw_message_processing_failures` | table timestamp session_id session_key run_id outcome reason duration_ms provider model | sort - timestamp", row=8, "`openclaw_session_state_events` | table timestamp session_id session_key run_id outcome reason status | sort - timestamp", row=9, "`openclaw_gateway_logs_base` | search run_id!=\"(unknown)\" OR session_id!=\"(unknown)\" | table timestamp level subsystem run_id session_id request_id status message | sort - timestamp", row=10, "`openclaw_diagnostics_base` | stats max(_time) as last_seen | eval minutes_since_last_diagnostic_event=round((now()-last_seen)/60, 2)", row=11, "`openclaw_metrics_base` | search metric_name=\"openclaw.tokens\" OR metric_name=\"openclaw.cost.usd\" | table timestamp metric_name metric_value provider model run_id session_id | sort - timestamp", row=12, "`openclaw_usage_traces` | table timestamp span_name trace_id span_id run_id session_id duration_ms status | sort - timestamp") | table pivot spl
`openclaw_queue_lane_events` | table timestamp lane session_id session_key run_id outcome wait_ms queue_depth reason | sort - timestamp | head 15
`openclaw_session_state_events` | table timestamp session_id session_key run_id outcome reason status | sort - timestamp | head 15
`openclaw_high_cost_or_slow_runs` | table run_id session_id session_key cost_usd run_duration_ms queue_wait_ms providers models | head 15

`openclaw_usage_traces` | search run_id!="(unknown)" OR session_id!="(unknown)" | table timestamp span_name run_id session_id session_key duration_ms provider model status | sort - timestamp | head 15

`defenseclaw_repeated_deny_activity` | eval workflow="Repeated Deny Activity" | table workflow run_id session_id deny_count actions severities | append [ search `defenseclaw_enforcement_action_detected` | eval workflow="Enforcement Action Detected" | table workflow run_id session_id action severity actor target ] | append [ search `defenseclaw_high_severity_burst` | eval workflow="High Severity Audit Burst" | table workflow run_id session_id high_severity_count actions ] | append [ search `openclaw_repeated_gateway_error_signature` | eval workflow="Repeated Gateway Error Signature" | table workflow subsystem error_signature signature_count run_ids session_ids ] | append [ search `openclaw_queue_pressure_sustained` | eval workflow="Queue Pressure Sustained" | table workflow run_id session_id pressure_matches max_queue_depth max_wait_ms signal_sources ] | append [ search `openclaw_retry_or_stuck_sessions` | eval workflow="Retry Storm Or Stuck Session" | table workflow run_id session_id match_count alert_reasons max_threshold_value ] | append [ search `openclaw_high_cost_or_slow_run_alert` | eval workflow="High Cost Or Slow Run" | table workflow run_id session_id cost_usd run_duration_ms providers models ] | head 20

| makeresults count=7 | streamstats count as row | eval workflow=case( row=1, "Repeated Deny Activity", row=2, "Enforcement Action Detected", row=3, "High Severity Audit Burst", row=4, "Repeated Gateway Error Signature", row=5, "Queue Pressure Sustained", row=6, "Retry Storm Or Stuck Session", row=7, "High Cost Or Slow Run" ), starting_point=case( row=1, "`defenseclaw_repeated_deny_activity`", row=2, "`defenseclaw_enforcement_action_detected`", row=3, "`defenseclaw_high_severity_burst`", row=4, "`openclaw_repeated_gateway_error_signature`", row=5, "`openclaw_queue_pressure_sustained`", row=6, "`openclaw_retry_or_stuck_sessions`", row=7, "`openclaw_high_cost_or_slow_run_alert`" ), target_view=case( row=1 OR row=2 OR row=3, "Audit And Security", row=4, "Gateway Logs", row=5 OR row=6, "Queue And Runtime Health", row=7, "Model Usage And Cost" ) | table workflow starting_point target_view
